rules.trade_description: BRK holds the swap rights. Main pool: {BRK, PHI(if 9-30), PHX, NYK}. BRK gets the most/two most favorable in normal scenarios; if PHI is 3rd most favorable AND NYK is 1st or 2nd, BRK gets 1st and 3rd. BRK's own pick could go to NYK (least of {BRK, PHX, NYK}), WAS (if BRK is LF of {BRK, PHI, PHX} and WAS takes it), or PHX (absolute worst).
